message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Get Authority

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 15
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor #008b8b
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #ccffcc
  ArrowColor #008b8b
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam TitleFontSize 28
skinparam TitleFontStyle bold

participant "MBO" as MBO
participant "TrainController" as TC

box "MBO Receives Position and Transmits Authority" #eeeeee
  MBO -> MBO : receiveTrainPosition(String)
  activate MBO
  deactivate MBO

  MBO -> TC : getPosition(String)
  activate TC
  TC --> MBO : trainPosition[2]
  deactivate TC

  MBO -> MBO : calculateAuthority(String)
  activate MBO
  deactivate MBO

  MBO -> MBO : transmitMboAuthority(String, double[2])
  activate MBO
  deactivate MBO

  MBO -> TC : setMboAuthority(String, double)
end box

@enduml
```
